description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, pastel pink exterior and a decorative white icing border along the top and bottom edges. The cake sits on a flat, terracotta-colored plate. On the front side, the cake features the letters 'GB' in large, gradient purple-to-pink block letters standing upright on top, and the side is adorned with the text 'GB 10' and a subtle rainbow stripe, suggesting a celebratory or anniversary theme. The surface is sleek and even, with no visible texture except for the piped icing borders. The cake appears to be made of a soft, spongy interior covered in a layer of fondant or buttercream. There are no candles or additional decorations, giving it a clean, minimalist look.
description: A round, pastel pink cake with white piped icing borders, 'GB' block letters on top, and celebratory text on the side, displayed on a terracotta plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'GB' block letters on top, white icing borders, and the 'GB 10' text with a rainbow stripe on the side.
description_view_1: Side view with the 'GB' letters seen edge-on, minimal visible decoration, and the terracotta plate clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the 'GB' letters and the smooth, undecorated pink surface of the cake.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the 'GB' letters seen edge-on and a faint logo or marking on the cake's side.
